ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "poll_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the poll (e.g., Trump, Biden) */,
  "date_modeled" TEXT /* Date the poll was modeled */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was added to the database */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., presidential approval, congressional approval, issue-specific) */,
  "poll_description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the poll */,
  "poll_region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the poll was conducted */,
  "poll_source" TEXT /* Source or organization that provided the poll data */,
  "poll_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "poll_confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the poll results */,
  "poll_start_date" TEXT /* Date the poll started */,
  "poll_end_date" TEXT /* Date the poll ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "pollster_website" TEXT /* Website of the pollster */,
  "pollster_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "pollster_established" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was established */,
  "pollster_reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll-metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the metadata belongs to */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster who conducted the poll */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the poll */,
  "poll_weighting_method" TEXT /* Method used to weight the poll results */,
  "poll_sample_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic characteristics of the sample */,
  "poll_funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the poll */,
  "poll_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the poll results were published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the party (e.g., D, R, I) */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the party */,
  "party_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the result belongs to */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the result is for */,
  "pct_approve_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of approval */,
  "pct_disapprove_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of disapproval */,
  "pct_unsure_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of unsure responses */,
  "pct_strongly_approve_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of strongly approve responses */,
  "pct_strongly_disapprove_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of strongly disapprove responses */,
  "result_confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the demographic belongs to */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic (e.g., age, gender, income) */,
  "demographic_value" TEXT /* Value of the demographic (e.g., 18-34, Male, $50,000-$75,000) */,
  "demographic_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the demographic for analysis */,
  "demographic_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES poll_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comment_flags" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been flagged by other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the tag is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag */,
  "tag_status" TEXT /* Status of the tag (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user when rating the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the poll */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was downloaded */,
  "download_format" TEXT /* Format in which the poll was downloaded */,
  "download_size" INTEGER /* Size of the downloaded file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_downloads_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
